status_label: corpus-proven production contract for observed approved branches

corpus.note: 1489/2317 is production IR-routing coverage for this SHA, not exhaustive visual conformance. PARTIALLY_SUPPORTED legacy labels are not full capability conformance.

alpha_mode_provenance.resolver_policy_when_test_blend_absent: game-file alpha contract: AlphaTransparency=true→CLIP; false→OPAQUE+shading_attenuation; absent→OPAQUE fail-closed (never has_alpha TXMP presence)
alpha_mode_provenance.authored_mask: saturate(Alpha.r * BaseColorAlpha.a) — DXIL product; see materials.alpha / ALPHA_CONTRACTS
alpha_mode_provenance.blender_backend_policy: EEVEE Next compiles evaluated IR only; GREATER_THAN cutout when SurfaceVisibility(CLIP); backend BLENDED ≠ Forza BLEND branch

production.compatibility_fallback: other families only; car_standard exact SHA must not use fallback

inactive: shared defaultshader_diff placeholders without branch evidence
base_color.expression: saturate(TextureSample * BaseColor_Tint * BaseColor_TintMultiplier); then TintMode.xy metal lerp; optionally Multiply(base, AO.B)

alpha.source: DXIL samples t16 Alpha.r and t17 BaseColorAlpha.a; binding via MatI/TXMP only

modes.provenance: See materials.alpha.car_standard_alpha_contract + DXIL audit 2026-07-21_id39-grille-coverage_alpha-pso. No filename/material-name/texture-stat heuristics.
modes.BLEND_graph: only when UseAlphaBlend=true and UseAlphaTest≠true (never observed in this corpus)
modes.OPAQUE: AlphaTransparency=false → visibility Constant(1.0); authored_mask may still be ShadingAttenuation
modes.UNRESOLVED: AlphaTransparency absent → fail closed; do not invent CLIP from Alpha TXMP

alpha.corpus_note: UseAlphaTest/UseAlphaBlend absent on all 1489; AlphaTransparency True=378 False=1111

uv.default_when_absent: fail-closed unless unique TEXCOORD on binding

shared_u_v_tiling_branch.when: all Override*TilingOnOff == false (observed on full car_standard corpus)

per_binding_override_true_branches.production: reject when any Override*=true until independent DXIL slice + corpus evidence
per_binding_override_true_branches.note: Do not claim proven merely because switch/parameter names exist in shaderbin

switches.name: UVChoice_OnCh1_OffCh2
switches.effect: select MeshUV(0) vs MeshUV(1) for BaseColorAlpha/Alpha/Normal/RoughMetalAO

switches.name: BaseColorOverrideSwitch
switches.effect: pending: constant/paint override path when true
switches.production: pending_review; reject if true in production_mode

switches.name: AlphaTransparency
switches.effect: enables external alpha map / transparent mix when true

switches.name: UseAlphaTest
switches.effect: CLIP when present+true (shader default path recoverable)

switches.name: OverrideBaseColorTilingOnOff
switches.effect: false → use UV policy tiling; true branch pending

switches.name: GlassSwitch
switches.effect: true would divert to glass-like path — not clean IR

switches.name: BypassSFXOnOff
switches.effect: DXIL icmp gates SurfaceFX; clean IR leaves FX unbound either way

switches.name: CrumpleDamageSwitch
switches.effect: damage/FX path; not wired in clean IR

switches.name: ScratchesOnOff
switches.effect: SFX; not wired in clean IR

blender_backend.constraint: compiler must not inspect MatI/TXMP/shader filenames; decisions live in evaluated ForzaMaterialIR
